## 💡 Why This Exists

Finding free or affordable AI image generation APIs shouldn’t be hard.
Most lists are out of date within weeks and never tell you whether an
endpoint is actually *working*.

This directory is **auto-scanned** – a CI job hits every endpoint on a
schedule, records response times, and updates this README so you always
know which APIs are live right now.

## 🚀 Quick Start (Python)

Most providers expose an OpenAI-compatible `/v1/images/generations`
endpoint, so you can use the official OpenAI SDK with a custom
`base_url`.

```python
from openai import OpenAI

# Example: HuggingFace Inference API (free, token recommended)
client = OpenAI(
    base_url="https://api-inference.huggingface.co/v1/",
    api_key="hf_YOUR_TOKEN",  # or set HUGGINGFACE_API_KEY env var
)

response = client.images.generate(
    model="black-forest-labs/FLUX.1-schnell",
    prompt="A futuristic cityscape at sunset, cyberpunk style",
    size="1024x1024",
    n=1,
)

image_url = response.data[0].url
print("Generated:", image_url)
```

## 📡 Quick Start (cURL)

```bash
# Pollinations – completely free, no key needed
curl -s 'https://image.pollinations.ai/prompt/A%20red%20panda%20wearing%20a%20top%20hat' -o panda.jpg

# HuggingFace Inference API
curl -X POST "https://api-inference.huggingface.co/models/black-forest-labs/FLUX.1-schnell" \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer $HUGGINGFACE_API_KEY" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"inputs": "A magical forest with glowing mushrooms"}' \
  -o forest.png
```

## 🎯 Tier 1 – Truly Free

| Provider | Endpoint | Free Limits | Models | Capabilities |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| [HuggingFace Inference](https://huggingface.co/join) | `https://router.huggingface.co/v1/images/generations` | ~300 req/hr | FLUX.1-dev, SDXL, SD 3.5 | txt2img, img2img |
| [Cloudflare Workers AI](https://dash.cloudflare.com/) | `https://api.cloudflare.com/client/v4/accounts/{account_id}/ai/run/@cf/stabilityai/stable-diffusion-xl-base-1.0` | 10K images/day | SDXL Lightning, Dreamshaper | txt2img |
| [Pollinations.ai](https://pollinations.ai) | `https://image.pollinations.ai/prompt/{prompt}` | Unlimited (best-effort) | FLUX, SDXL | txt2img |

| [Together AI](https://www.together.ai/) | `https://api.together.xyz/v1/images/generations` | $5 free credits | FLUX.1-schnell-Free, SDXL, SD 3.5 | txt2img |
| [Clipdrop / Stability](https://clipdrop.co/) | `https://clipdrop-api.co/text-to-image/v1` | Limited free tier | Stable Diffusion | txt2img, img2img, upscale |

| [Dezgo](https://dezgo.com/) | `https://api.dezgo.com/text2image` | Free tier available | SDXL, SD 3 | txt2img, img2img, inpaint, upscale |
| [StarryAI API](https://starryai.com/) | `https://api.starryai.com/creations/` | 5 images/day | StarryAI | txt2img |
| [Craiyon](https://www.craiyon.com/) | `https://api.craiyon.com/v3` | Free (slow, watermarked) | Craiyon v3 | txt2img |
| [Segmind](https://www.segmind.com/) | `https://api.segmind.com/v1/sdxl1.0-txt2img` | 100 free credits | SDXL, FLUX, Realistic Vision | txt2img, img2img |
| [AirBrush API](https://www.airbrush.ai/) | `https://api.airbrush.ai/v1/text-to-image` | 50 free credits | Stable Diffusion, SDXL | txt2img, img2img |

## 🚦 Status Legend

| Symbol | Status | Meaning |
| :---: | --- | --- |
| ✅ | `working` | Endpoint returned a valid image |
| 🟡 | `reachable` | Endpoint responded but image was not verified |
| 🔑 | `auth_missing` | API key required but not configured |
| 🔴 | `auth_failed` | API key was rejected by the provider |
| 💳 | `needs_credits` | Account has no remaining credits |
| ⏳ | `rate_limited` | Too many requests – try again later |
| ⏱️ | `timeout` | Request timed out |
| ❌ | `error` | Endpoint returned an error |
| 💤 | `offline` | Endpoint is unreachable |
| ⏭️ | `skipped` | Provider was not scanned |
| ❓ | `unknown` | Status could not be determined |

## 📁 Project Structure

```text
ai_image_generation/
├── __version__.py          # Version string
├── config.py               # Configuration loader
├── config.yaml             # Default configuration
├── providers.py            # Provider dataclass & registry
├── scanner.py              # Endpoint health scanner
├── report_generator.py     # This file – README generator
├── requirements.txt        # Python dependencies
├── .env.example            # API key template
├── data/                   # Scan results & caches
├── adapters/               # Per-provider HTTP adapters
├── agents/                 # AI-powered discovery agents
├── discovery/              # Provider discovery strategies
├── plugins/                # Optional plugins (benchmark, export, …)
├── recipes/                # End-to-end usage recipes
├── search/                 # Web search integration
├── tools/                  # CLI entry points
└── examples/               # Standalone example scripts
```

## ⚙️ Setup

### 1. Install dependencies

```bash
pip install -r requirements.txt
```

### 2. Configure API keys

```bash
cp .env.example .env
# Edit .env and add keys for the providers you want to test.
# Providers marked “no key” (e.g. Pollinations) work without any setup.
```

### 3. (Optional) Customise settings

Edit `config.yaml` to change scan concurrency, timeouts, discovery
strategies, and more.  Environment variables override YAML values –
see `config.py` for the full mapping.

## 💻 CLI Reference

| Command | Description |
| --- | --- |
| `python -m tools.scan` | Scan all providers and save results |
| `python -m tools.scan --tier 1` | Scan only Tier 1 (free) providers |
| `python -m report_generator` | Regenerate this README from latest data |
| `python -m discovery` | Run AI-powered provider discovery |
| `python -m plugins.benchmark` | Benchmark image quality & latency |
| `python -m plugins.export --format csv` | Export provider data to CSV/JSON |
| `python -m tools.proxy` | Start the local OpenAI-compatible proxy |
